resources.string: Unlock additional features and become a patron to support continued development!

plurals.name: upgrades_dashcard_device_limit_hint
plurals.item: The free version is limited to %1$d device.
The free version is limited to %1$d devices.

resources.string: Octi has no ads and doesn\'t sell user data. My work is financed by you ❤️
Become a patron and sponsor development! Tap the button below to activate all extra features and open my GitHub Sponsors profile.

More than 3 devices 💯
• Different themes 🎨
• More options ⚙️
• Extra sync servers🖥️
• Continued open source development 🧙
The alternative are ads, analytics and Google Play 🙁
Thank you for supporting open-source development ❤️
Back already? Your support keeps Octi alive!
Thank you for supporting open-source development of Octi!
You are on the free version
Become a supporter to unlock extra features and sponsor continued development.
